description: Sigma is a cloud analytics and application platform for working with live warehouse data. It lets teams build dashboards, data apps, and AI-assisted workflows on governed data from systems like Snowflake, Databricks, BigQuery, and Redshift.
summary: sigmacomputing.com exposes a Sigma REST API on `https://api.sigmacomputing.com/v2`, a public documentation MCP server on `https://help.sigmacomputing.com/mcp`, an authenticated Sigma MCP server with undocumented connection details, and a Sigma CLI.
